name: actionability
description: Does the one-shot doc preserve enough instruction that an LLM could execute it? Compression that strips actionable content fails this test.
task_prompt:
Below is a briefing document intended for an LLM to execute. Reading only this document, would an LLM know concretely what it needs to do?

Document:
---
{input}
---

Answer exactly one word: yes or no.
